name: Bubbie's Dairy Noodle Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles according to package directions and drain well.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles with the melted margarine, sour cream, cottage cheese, sugar, salt, and raisins (if using).
3. Add the eggs to the mixture and mix until fully combined.
4. Transfer the batter to a greased 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 1 hour or until golden brown and set.
6. Serve with fresh fruit, pie filling, or additional sour cream on top.
This recipe is forgiving; if you omit the sour cream, sugar, and raisins, you'll have a classic salt kugel suitable for serving with chicken or beef.
